name: Patch On-Start Script Env
description: Patches a single shell variable assignment in an on-start script under ${VOLUME_DIR}/on_start.d/. Used by refresh-stack task for credentials baked into generated scripts (e.g. acme-renew.sh with CF_API_TOKEN).

parameters.name: LXC Container ID
parameters.description: LXC container ID the on-start script belongs to.

parameters.name: Hostname
parameters.description: Container hostname (used to locate volume directory).

parameters.name: Shell Variable Name
parameters.description: Shell variable whose value is patched (e.g. CF_API_TOKEN).

parameters.name: New Value
parameters.description: New value for the shell variable.
